summary: Comprehensive testing of Shalom Learning Admin Panel completed. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend admin panel fully functional with all features working: login, dashboard stats, course CRUD, user management (grant/revoke access, delete), lesson management.

minor.issue: Some payments have null amounts in database, causing 'R$ undefined' display

issues: 'R$ undefined' displayed for payments with null amounts - should show 'N/A' or '0.00'

passed_tests: Admin login rejection with invalid credentials
GET /api/admin/courses - Returns all courses including unpublished
GET /api/courses - Returns only published courses (verified filter)
DELETE /api/admin/courses/{id} - Delete course and associated lessons
GET /api/admin/users - List all users with purchasedCourses
POST /api/admin/lessons/add - Add lesson with YouTube URL and PDF
Regular user cannot access admin endpoints (403)
Frontend: Admin login page UI working
Frontend: All admin tabs (Dashboard, Courses, Users, Payments, Lessons) navigable
action_items: OPTIONAL: Add null-check for payment amount display in Payments tab (show 'N/A' instead of 'undefined')
critical_code_review_comments: Backend code is well-structured with proper admin verification
All CRUD operations implemented correctly with proper cleanup
YouTube URL conversion to embed format working correctly
Frontend has proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test users and courses created during testing were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel fully functional. All CRUD operations work. Use provided admin credentials for testing. Test data cleanup is handled via TEST_ prefix pattern.

features_tested.api_published_filter: PASS - GET /api/courses returns only published, GET /api/admin/courses returns all
